name: Tofu Whipped Cream
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Tofu, fresh, soft, do NOT use
4 tbsp Maple syrup, up to 6 tbsp
2 tsp Arrowroot powder, up to 3 tsp
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the tofu in cold water and press between several layers of paper or clean cloth towels to squeeze out all water possible.
2. Break the tofu into small pieces or mash it, and place it in a blender or food processor.
3. Add the remaining ingredients and blend until smooth.
4. Taste and adjust flavoring if desired, then blend again if necessary.
5. If using optional thickener, add it now and continue blending until desired consistency is reached.
6. Chill before serving. Use in place of whipping cream on top of pies or other desserts.
